Identity.Tooltip: Elite mercenary archer renowned for exceptional accuracy and rapid fire. (10% faster repeat time and 25% more accurate. Additionly they have +1.5 Pierace and +1 Crush/Hack resistance.) Strengths: Highly effective against lightly armored troops at range. Weaknesses: Requires protection from cavalry and melee infantry.
Identity.History: Cretan archers were among the most sought-after professional missile troops of the ancient Mediterranean.
